title: Learning Loop Seed Matrix
purpose: Represent real reviewer findings as layered learning-loop seeds without opening Gate 3.
claim_ceiling: static advisory checks can detect layer misuse
no banking, replay, CI blocker, completion gate, or enforcement claim is made

seeds.title: Runtime ledger no-write env shadow regression
seeds.expected_signal: CLI absent flag must defer to AI_GOVERNANCE_NO_LEDGER_WRITE env fallback instead of forcing ledger_write_allowed=True.
non_claims: does not prove all session-end paths are regression-protected
does not add an eval runner
